channel.title: Ios on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Ios on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: fleetdm/fleet
item.description: Open device management

item.title: rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI
item.description: Fast, scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate TestFlight, builds, submissions, signing, analytics, screenshots, subscriptions, and more. JSON-first, no interactive prompts

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: 💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything.

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, RK NPU, Axera NPU, Ascend NPU, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

item.title: alphacep/vosk-api
item.description: Offline speech recognition API for Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi and servers with Python, Java, C# and Node

item.title: berty/berty
item.description: Berty is a secure peer-to-peer messaging app that works with or without internet access, cellular data or trust in the network

item.title: GopeedLab/gopeed
item.description: A fast, modern download manager for HTTP, BitTorrent, Magnet, and ed2k. Cross-platform, built with Golang and Flutter.

item.title: brandonp2412/Flexify
item.description: 💪 Track your gym progress and flex on people

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter
item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: lollipopkit/flutter_server_box
item.description: ServerBox - server status & toolbox

item.title: isar/isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: thunder-app/thunder
item.description: An open-source cross-platform Lemmy & PieFed client for iOS and Android

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-dart
item.description: Flutter database for super-fast Dart object persistence

item.title: spieglt/FlyingCarpet
item.description: Cross-platform AirDrop. File transfer between Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows over ad hoc WiFi. No network infrastructure required, just two devices with WiFi chips (and optionally Bluetooth) in close range.

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (KDBX 3 and KDBX 4) compatible.

item.title: picguard/picguard
item.description: Your pictures, your signature.

item.title: SimformSolutionsPvtLtd/chatview
item.description: Highly customisable chat UI with reply and reaction functionality.

item.title: appleboy/gorush
item.description: A push notification server written in Go (Golang).

item.title: flyerhq/flutter_chat_ui
item.description: Free and open-source chat SDK. Build fast, real-time apps and generative AI agents with a high-performance, customizable, cross-platform UI.

item.title: SebastienBtr/Dash-Chat-2
item.description: The most complete Chat UI for flutter. Easy to use, highly customizable and fully featured

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: keshav-space/safenotes
item.description: Safe Notes is a security project aimed at providing an encrypted, private note manager that works locally and protects notes from various threat actors.

item.title: libimobiledevice/ifuse
item.description: A fuse filesystem to access the contents of iOS devices

item.title: golang-design/clipboard
item.description: 📋 cross-platform clipboard package that supports accessing text and image in Go (macOS/Linux/Windows/Android/iOS)

item.title: MaikuB/flutter_appauth
item.description: A Flutter wrapper for AppAuth iOS and Android SDKs

item.title: oi-narendra/multiselect-dropdown
item.description: Streamlined Flutter widget for versatile multi-selection with extensive customization.

item.title: arran4/Dimension
item.description: (Beta) Peer-to-peer group chat and file transfer.

item.title: afonsocraposo/buttons_tabbar
item.description: A Flutter package that implements a TabBar where each label is a toggle button.
